ab: ko jia nipalolo o peyvatvatek ko
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.

ab: ko jia nipalolo o sosopit ko
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ko akman sang a jia nimapalolo sya,mangey ta manazang
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: mangey ta manazang so peyvatvatek ta?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?
B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: mangey ta manazang so aryagen ta?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: tosya, ta ko na nikoman do vahey namen.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.

ab: ko jia nimanakem o otwan ko a azidangdangen.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!

ab: ko jia nimanakem o otwan ko a paloloen
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: o ko nipalolo a otwan ko sicyarow ya am, yagza ta.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: apiya ka peybozo ta mapakozong so bozo?
en: A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: apiya ka peybozo ta manipzot so bozo?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: taosya, ta meyvilang pa so vakong.
en: B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.
A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: ko mivyas,panci mo si Pavinen ta mahap sya itoro jimo.
ch: B:我在掃地，你叫si Pavinen幫你拿。
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, so ask si Pavinen to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.
A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: noon.mangey ko apen o zamit a ilinas jia
en: B: Okay, I'll get the cloth.

ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.
A: What do you do after school?

ab: namen mangey meyyanoanood ka no kagagan ko.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.
A: What's he doing after school?
B: He's going swimming.
